{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_017JGghQ2yXhgrxedA6kUmaF","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Now I fully understand the pipeline model: each assignment's `assigned_at → unassigned_at` is the business-time an employee held their stage (the `unassigned_at` matches their completion event). A bottleneck = consistently slow relative to peers in the same role/complexity. Let me build the business-hours duration metric and examine per-employee slowness."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":131,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2522,"cache_read_input_tokens":31609,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2522,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":35,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"1729dc7e-a941-490b-9daf-66875e078667","uuid":"9b2535ad-6580-4244-a669-126e59b704a9","request_id":"req_011Cbf96ykpY2i3EecSntqNm"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_017JGghQ2yXhgrxedA6kUmaF","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01C8BN1YjGbrM2oPJhXWn8f2","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"cat > /app/bizhours.py << 'EOF'\nimport numpy as np, pandas as pd\n\nWORK_START=9; WORK_END=17; WORK_LEN=WORK_END-WORK_START  # 8h\n\ndef business_seconds_vec(start, end):\n    \"\"\"Vectorized business-seconds between start and end (Series of Timestamps).\n    Counts only Mon-Fri 09:00-17:00 UTC.\"\"\"\n    s=pd.to_datetime(start).values.astype('datetime64[s]')\n    e=pd.to_datetime(end).values.astype('datetime64[s]')\n    out=np.zeros(len(s))\n    for i in range(len(s)):\n        a=pd.Timestamp(s[i]); b=pd.Timestamp(e[i])\n        if pd.isna(a) or pd.isna(b) or b<=a:\n            out[i]=0.0; continue\n        total=0.0\n        day=a.normalize()\n        last=b.normalize()\n        while day<=last:\n            if day.dayofweek<5:\n                ws=day+pd.Timedelta(hours=WORK_START)\n                we=day+pd.Timedelta(hours=WORK_END)\n                lo=max(a,ws); hi=min(b,we)\n                if hi>lo:\n                    total+=(hi-lo).total_seconds()\n            day+=pd.Timedelta(days=1)\n        out[i]=total\n    return out\nEOF\necho \"written\"","description":"Write business-hours helper module"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":131,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2522,"cache_read_input_tokens":31609,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2522,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":35,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"1729dc7e-a941-490b-9daf-66875e078667","uuid":"8a6597ae-ed52-4d0f-b8fb-a116312b16f5","request_id":"req_011Cbf96ykpY2i3EecSntqNm"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01GjGZs58wBDUGArHQKv2zXK","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01KsCnbZyBSUnAeo2B4tjrAe","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'EOF'\nimport pandas as pd, glob, numpy as np\nfrom bizhours import business_seconds_vec\ndef load(prefix):\n    return pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob(f'/app/{prefix}*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)\n\nta=load('task_assignment_'); tasks=pd.read_csv('/app/task_001.csv')\nta=ta.merge(tasks[['task_id','complexity_score','risk_score','priority','task_type']],on='task_id',how='left')\nta['bizh']=business_seconds_vec(ta.assigned_at, ta.unassigned_at)/3600.0\n\n# baseline per role: median bizh\nrole_med=ta.groupby('assignment_role')['bizh'].median()\nprint(\"median bizh per role:\")\nprint(role_med.sort_values().to_string())\nta['role_med']=ta.assignment_role.map(role_med)\n# ratio of duration to role median (slowness)\nta['ratio']=ta.bizh/ta.role_med.replace(0,np.nan)\nta.to_parquet('/tmp/ta.parquet')\n\n# per-employee aggregate slowness\ng=ta.groupby('employee_id').agg(n=('bizh','size'),\n                                med_ratio=('ratio','median'),\n                                mean_ratio=('ratio','mean'),\n                                med_bizh=('bizh','median')).reset_index()\nprint(\"\\nper-employee median ratio distribution:\")\nprint(g.med_ratio.describe([.5,.75,.9,.95,.99]).to_string())\nprint(\"\\nTop 25 slowest employees by median ratio (min 10 assignments):\")\nprint(g[g.n>=10].sort_values('med_ratio',ascending=False).head(25).to_string(index=False))\nEOF","description":"Compute business-hours durations and per-employee slowness"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2616,"cache_read_input_tokens":34131,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2616,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":68,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"1729dc7e-a941-490b-9daf-66875e078667","uuid":"93f29977-6b37-4609-9f3c-47f4209994c7","request_id":"req_011Cbf99NDExfqxFs6myHvuj"}

<< 'EOF'\nimport pandas as pd, numpy as np, glob\nfrom bizhours import business_seconds_vec\ndef load(prefix):\n    return pd.concat([pd.read_csv(f) for f in sorted(glob.glob(f'/app/{prefix}*.csv'))], ignore_index=True)\nemp=pd.read_csv('/app/employee_001.csv')\n\n# MEETINGS\nmt=pd.read_csv('/app/meeting_001.csv')\nmt['dur']=business_seconds_vec(mt.start_time, mt.end_time)/3600.0\nmp=load('meeting_participant_')\nmp=mp.merge(mt[['meeting_id','dur']],on='meeting_id',how='left')\nmtg=mp.groupby('employee_id').agg(n_meetings=('meeting_id','size'), meeting_hours=('dur','sum')).reset_index()\n\n# MESSAGES\nmsg=load('message_metadata_')\nsent=msg.groupby('sender_id').size().rename('msg_sent')\nrecv=msg.groupby('receiver_id').size().rename('msg_recv')\n\n# merge into emp\ne=emp.merge(mtg,left_on='employee_id',right_on='employee_id',how='left')\ne=e.merge(sent,left_on='employee_id',right_index=True,how='left')\ne=e.merge(recv,left_on='employee_id',right_index=True,how='left')\ne=e.fillna({'n_meetings':0,'meeting_hours':0,'msg_sent':0,'msg_recv':0})\nprint(\"=== meeting hours by seniority (mean) ===\")\nprint(e.groupby('seniority_level')[['n_meetings','meeting_hours','msg_sent','msg_recv']].mean().round(1).to_string())\nprint(\"\\n=== Top 15 meeting_hours ===\")\nprint(e.sort_values('meeting_hours',ascending=False).head(15)[['employee_id','role','seniority_level','n_meetings','meeting_hours','msg_sent','msg_recv']].to_string(index=False))\nprint(\"\\n=== Top 15 total messages (sent+recv) ===\")\ne['msg_total']=e.msg_sent+e.msg_recv\nprint(e.sort_values('msg_total',ascending=False).head(15)[['employee_id','role','seniority_level','n_meetings','meeting_hours','msg_sent','msg_recv']].to_string(index=False))\ne.to_pickle('/tmp/emp_load.pkl')\nEOF","description":"Compute e=pd.read_pickle('/tmp/emp_load.pkl')\nta['assigned_at']=pd.to_datetime(ta.assigned_at); ta['unassigned_at']=pd.to_datetime(ta.unassigned_at)\ne['msg_total']=e.msg_sent+e.msg_recv\n\n# slow-active-work robust z (recompute)\nta['logb']=np.log1p(ta.bizh)\nst=ta.groupby('assignment_role')['logb'].agg(['median', lambda x:(np.abs(x-x.median())).median()]); st.columns=['med','mad']\nta=ta.merge(st,left_on='assignment_role',right_index=True)\nta['z']=(ta.logb-ta.med)/(ta['mad']*1.4826+1e-9)\nslow=ta.groupby('employee_id')['z'].median()\n\n# wait gaps\nta=ta.sort_values(['task_id','assigned_at'])\nta['prev']=ta.groupby('task_id')['unassigned_at'].shift(1)\nm=ta.prev.notna()\ng=np.zeros(len(ta));
